name: paperfit
description: PaperFit plugin assets for Codex. Installs PaperFit skills and prompt-ready workflow metadata.

interface.shortDescription: LaTeX paper layout repair, visual inspection, and template migration
interface.longDescription: Use PaperFit in Codex through slash commands for layout analysis, full VTO repair, visual-only inspection, table repair, length control, template migration, status review, and rollback.
defaultPrompt: Use /prompts:paperfit to inspect this paper's layout
Run /prompts:fix-layout to repair the paper with minimal semantic change
Use /prompts:show-status to summarize the current PaperFit round
